LanguageData.FB_BrainFleshResurrection_CommandDesc: Select a fresh humanlike corpse with an intact brain. Resurrection consumes one fingerspike per 300 of the pawn's healthy Market Value.
LanguageData.FB_BrainFleshResurrection_AlreadyAssigne: A resurrection is already in progress.
LanguageData.FB_BrainFleshResurrection_NoFingerspike: No capable player-owned fingerspike is available.
LanguageData.FB_BrainFleshResurrection_NoReachableFin: No capable fingerspike can reach this corpse.
LanguageData.FB_BrainFleshResurrection_CannotStart: The selected fingerspike could not begin the resurrection.
LanguageData.FB_BrainFleshResurrection_NotEnoughFinge: Resurrection needs {0} fingerspikes, but only {1} can reach this corpse.
LanguageData.FB_BrainFleshResurrection_InvalidTarget: Select a fresh humanlike corpse on this map.
LanguageData.FB_BrainFleshResurrection_NotFresh: Only fresh corpses can be resurrected through flesh.
LanguageData.FB_BrainFleshResurrection_HumanlikeOnly: Only humanlike corpses can be resurrected through flesh.
LanguageData.FB_BrainFleshResurrection_BrainRequired: The corpse must have an intact brain.
LanguageData.FB_BrainFleshResurrection_TargetAlreadyA: This corpse is already assigned to another colony brain.
LanguageData.FB_BrainFleshResurrection_Failed: The flesh failed to reanimate the corpse.
LanguageData.FB_BrainFleshResurrection_Success: {0} has been resurrected and accepted by the flesh colony.
